title: Anatomy Nerve Course Posterior Lumbar Decompression Fusion
must_know: Midline incision over spinous processes. Incise lumbodorsal fascia to spinous process, preserve interspinous ligament. Detach paraspinal (erector spinae) subperiosteally down to lamina/facet. Remove ligamentum flavum (attaches halfway up undersurface of lamina). Stay lateral to dura with blunt disse

structures_at_risk.structure: Posterior lumbar: midline approach for discectomy, nerve root exploration, fusion, tumors. Highest point on iliac crest marks L4-5 interspace.
structures_at_risk.why_it_matters: Injury leads to sensory loss or neuroma; protect or resect/bury as per OB.

common_pimp_questions: Posterior lumbar approach: iliac crest landmark for level, subperiosteal paraspinal elevation, ligamentum flavum removal, staying lateral to dura.
retrieval_phrases: anatomy nerve course posterior lumbar decompression fusion
nerve decompression anatomy nerve course posterior lumbar decompression fusion

title: Decompression Cubital Tunnel Release
must_know: Per map evidence: OB describes specific approaches (e.g. lateral for bimalleolar) but catalog gaps prevent full recommended IDs. No free-form guessing; limited to available (e.g. posteromedial for some ankle variants).
